title: paspalum inaequivalve
intro: Paspalum inaequivalve is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass found in various parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Paspalum inaequivalve include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling, fight off infections, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Paspalum inaequivalve is often used as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves to treat wounds and skin conditions.
